inputs.label: Calculation Mode
inputs.businessContext: 1: Unit Conversion (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2: HbA1c to eAG (mg/dL), 3: eAG (mg/dL) to HbA1c

businessContext_i18n.en: 1: Unit Conversion (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2: HbA1c to eAG (mg/dL), 3: eAG (mg/dL) to HbA1c
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1: Birim Dönüşümü (mg/dL <-> mmol/L), 2: HbA1c'den eAG'ye (mg/dL), 3: eAG'den (mg/dL) HbA1c'ye

inputs.label: Input Value
inputs.businessContext: The blood glucose value to convert or calculate from; unit depends on mode and unitFrom

businessContext_i18n.en: The blood glucose value to convert or calculate from; unit depends on mode and unitFrom
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülecek veya hesaplanacak kan glukoz değeri; birim, mod ve unitFrom'a bağlıdır

inputs.label: Input Unit
inputs.businessContext: 1 for mg/dL, 2 for mmol/L (used in mode 1; in other modes, assume input units accordingly)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for mg/dL, 2 for mmol/L (used in mode 1; in other modes, assume input units accordingly)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 mg/dL, 2 mmol/L (mod 1'de kullanılır; diğer modlarda giriş birimi buna göre varsayılır)

inputs.label: Target Unit
inputs.businessContext: 1 for mg/dL, 2 for mmol/L (used in mode 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for mg/dL, 2 for mmol/L (used in mode 1)

inputs.label: Fasting State
inputs.businessContext: 1 if fasting, 0 if non-fasting (for reference only, does not affect calculation)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 if fasting, 0 if non-fasting (for reference only, does not affect calculation)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 aç, 0 tok (yalnızca referans amaçlıdır, hesaplamayı etkilemez)

breakdown: Unit conversion: mg/dL to mmol/L: divide by 18.0182; mmol/L to mg/dL: multiply by 18.0182
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
